summary: EXP-158 replaces the hardcoded count words in SEC-2b.1 stratification with 7 new template variables ({{CA_NONE_REFUTED/SELFCON/MISLEADING/STD/NOTDEMO/UNFALSIFIABLE}} and {{CA_HARDCODED_SELFCON}}). Decider: wire the placeholders in build-scripts/generate-html.js (single IIFE near line 973 + replacements entries near line 79 — exact snippet in the expansion), then splice replacement_html into data/sections.json part2b.html (locate by "Stratifying the unmonitored WINs" — replace that paragraph and the following contrast paragraph). Side-benefit: fixes a pre-existing 41-vs-40 off-by-one (WIN-058b was counted in the stratification but excluded from {{CA_NONE}} by the baseWins filter). Fallback if generate-html.js changes are out of scope: apply an "(as of V{{REVIEW_VERSION}} build {{BUILD_DATE}})" caveat — spec is in expansion.fallback.
